sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67640" key="mhxanosfairopoii/+a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μηχᾰνο-σφαιροποιΐα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n67640.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">construction of artificial spheres</tr_>, Theo Sm.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.180</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
